title: Maria Chapdelaine
writer: Louis Hémon, Julien Duvivier, Gabriel Boissy
actors: Madeleine Renaud, Suzanne Desprès, Gaby Triquet
plot: A young woman living with her family on the frontier in Quebec, Canada, endures the hardships of isolation and climate, and chooses between three suitors: a trapper, a farmer, and an immigrant from Paris.
